methods.description: Process for collecting and analyzing cores from the New Jersey shelf to study sediment composition and age.

steps.description: 612 cores were collected at three sites (Sites M0027, M0028, and M0029) with 80% recovery for a total of 1311 m.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment cores from specified sites

steps.description: Wireline logs were collected at the three sites including gamma ray, resistivity, magnetic susceptibility, sonic, acoustic televiewer, and vertical seismic profiles.
steps.searchable_summary: collect wireline logs from core sites

steps.description: Visual core descriptions and smear slide analyses, biostratigraphy, magnetostratigraphy, and pore water geochemistry were performed post-cruise.
Sr analyses were performed to get additional age control on the sediment.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct Sr analyses for age control

methods.description: Analysis of lithofacies successions to interpret depositional environments using core descriptions and seismic data.

steps.description: Detailed analysis of lithofacies successions and their interpretation in terms of depositional environment based on visual core description.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze lithofacies successions for depositional environment

steps.description: Genetically related facies successions are bounded by unconformities tied to the interpreted seismic line 529.
steps.searchable_summary: identify facies successions using seismic line 529

methods.method_name: Clinoform Trajectory and Depositional Model Analysis
methods.description: Analysis of clinoform trajectories and depositional models to understand sediment architecture and sequence stratigraphy.

steps.description: Analyze the trajectory of clinoform rollovers to characterize different stacks of clinothem units.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze clinoform rollovers for clinothem characterization

steps.description: Interpret the spatial organization of facies architecture in clinothems using core analysis and seismic data.
